case_title: INFINITI OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. TROY TRAYLOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF INFINITY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY JOHNSON, FIXED OPERATIONS DIRECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TROY TRAYLOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED MAR-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, TROY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INFINITI OF SAN FRANCISCO DBA BAY AREA NISSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, TROY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
